Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ornheim Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Ornheim Incarnation is a stone creature that looks like an older man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — The Ornheim Incarnation is made of fine white stone with multicolored lines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Ornheim Incarnation has pale stone skin with colorful marble-like veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Ornheim Incarnation possesses mountainous strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Ornheim Incarnation left Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Ornheim Incarnation has veins of every color running through him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Ornheim Incarnation is a towering entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Ornheim Incarnation summoned golems.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
